narrative:
Precinct East Rutland (precinct in Meigs County) has 491 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
